title: becium ellenbeckii
intro: Becium ellenbeckii, also known as Lippia ellenbeckii, is a plant species in the family Verbenaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Becium ellenbeckii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
